# Synthetic Based Fluids

**Summary**: Drilling fluids that use synthetic oils as the base.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] assessed the usage of synthetic-based-fluids in local operations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] SBF is an alternative to OBF that offers better environmental profiles in some contexts.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] Survey of company usage frequency.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- More than 50% of respondent companies used SBF. ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012, p. 131]])
